content.speaker: Unknown
content.text:
Messages from the President of the United States were communicated to 
the Senate by Mr. Williams, one of his secretaries.


                      executive messages referred

  As in executive session the Presiding Officer laid before the Senate 
messages from the President of the United States submitting a treaty 
and sundry nominations which were referred to the appropriate 
committees.
  (The nominations received today are printed at the end of the Senate 
proceedings.)
